installCommand: npm install -g pnpm@10.32.1 && node "$(npm root -g)/pnpm/bin/pnpm.cjs" --dir crates/agent-gateway/web install --frozen-lockfile
buildCommand: npm install -g pnpm@10.32.1 && VITE_DISABLE_MONACO=1 LIVEAGENT_WEBUI_DOCKER_BUILD=1 node "$(npm root -g)/pnpm/bin/pnpm.cjs" --dir crates/agent-gateway/web build
